2605.23668.title: OnePred: Next-Query Prediction via Recursive Intent Memory in Multi-Turn Conversations
2605.23668.paper_summary: Although large language model (LLM) conversational systems process millions of multi-turn dialogues daily, they remain fundamentally reactive: they respond only after the user types a query. A key step toward proactive interaction is next-query prediction, which anticipates the user's subsequent query based solely on the preceding dialogue. Progress on this task is hindered by the lack of dedicated benchmarks and a fundamental efficiency--quality trade-off: naively concatenating full dialogue history incurs linearly growing token consumption, while truncating to the latest turn discards crucial cross-turn context. Our key insight is that accurate prediction does not require re-reading raw history; it suffices to track the user's evolving intent trajectory across topics, unresolved needs, and interest shifts. We propose OnePred, which maintains a recursively updated memory as its sole cross-turn context, bounding the per-turn cost independently of conversation length. We train the model via a two-stage reinforcement learning pipeline that first teaches what to predict, then what to compress, shaping the memory into a prediction-oriented intent chain. To establish a rigorous testbed, we introduce NQP-Bench, spanning three diverse subsets. Experiments demonstrate that OnePred reduces per-turn token consumption by up to 22$\times$ compared to full-history inputs while consistently exceeding all baselines in prediction quality, with larger gains on longer conversations. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/ZBWpro/OnePred.
2605.23668.paper_summary_zh: 儘管大型語言模型 (LLM) 對話系統每天處理數百萬個多輪對話，但它們仍然基本上是反應性的：它們僅在用戶輸入查詢後才做出回應。邁向主動互動的一個關鍵步驟是下一查詢預測，它僅根據前面的對話來預測用戶的後續查詢。這項任務的進展受到缺乏專門基準和基本效率與質量之間的權衡的阻礙：天真的將完整對話歷史串聯起來會導致線性增長的標記消耗，而截斷到最新的回合則會丟失關鍵的跨回合上下文。我們的關鍵見解是，準確的預測不需要重新閱讀原始歷史；追蹤用戶在主題、未解決需求和興趣變化上的演變意圖軌跡就足夠了。我們提出了 OnePred，它將遞歸更新的記憶作為其唯一的跨回合上下文，將每回合的成本限制在與對話長度無關的範圍內。我們通過兩階段強化學習管道訓練模型，首先教學預測什麼，然後教學壓縮什麼，將記憶塑造成以預測為導向的意圖鏈。為了建立一個嚴謹的測試平台，我們引入了 NQP-Bench，涵蓋三個不同的子集。實驗表明，與完整歷史輸入相比，OnePred 將每回合的標記消耗降低了最多 22$\times$，同時在預測質量上始終超過所有基準，並在較長的對話中獲得更大的增益。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/ZBWpro/OnePred 上公開獲取。
2605.23668.author: Jiangwang Chen et.al.
2605.23668.authors: Jiangwang Chen, Bowen Zhang, Zixin Song, Jiazheng Kang, Xiao Yang, Da Zhu, Guanjun Jiang
